strengths: 14+ years of full-stack development significantly exceeding the 6+ year requirement; currently Staff Software Engineer at re:cinq
Direct match on primary stack: TypeScript, Node.js, and React in current role; demonstrated MongoDB, AWS CDK, and cloud infrastructure experience at Optilyz

Proven ability to build scalable systems: handled millions of HTTP requests/second at Dunnhumby; pricing optimization at Optilyz; strong TDD and testing philosophy evidenced through workshops and talks
concerns: Nest.js not explicitly mentioned in resume despite being listed as primary technology for the role
Specific testing frameworks (Vitest, Jest, Playwright) not detailed; Python proficiency not listed despite being required; PostgreSQL not mentioned
AI agent development experience appears limited to current role (April 2025) with MCP mention but no concrete project examples or depth demonstrated
response.justification: Bogdan substantially exceeds the seniority requirement with 14+ years as a full-stack engineer and current Staff Engineer title. His work at re:cinq matches the primary stack (TypeScript, Node.js, React), and Optilyz experience demonstrates MongoDB, AWS CDK, Docker, and production-scale systems expertise. However, critical gaps exist: Nest.js is not mentioned despite being a primary technology; specific testing tools (Vitest, Jest, Playwright) are not detailed beyond philosophy; Python is absent from his stated skillset; and AI agent development experience is recent and lacks depth. His polyglot background (D, Java, C++, PHP, C#, Swift) and track record of mastering new frameworks suggest these are learnable rather than fundamental concerns.
